name: mvs-monthly-value-sniper
description: MVS — Monthly Value Sniper v10.14. KuCoin API for Ghana. Five-timeframe (1D + 4H macro bias, 1H structure, 30m mid-rung bias, 15min trigger; 3-of-5 vote, scanned every 15min), 14 symbols, POC+VAH+VAL+FIBO, zero lagging indicators. Shared core.js logic between live bot and backtester. Public repo, unlimited GitHub Actions minutes.
author: Abdin
